# Self-hosted site fonts

- Montserrat variable (Latin, normal): SIL Open Font License 1.1
- Inter variable (Latin, normal and italic): SIL Open Font License 1.1

The optimized WOFF2 files are sourced from the corresponding Fontsource packages. The upstream projects are [Montserrat](https://github.com/JulietaUla/Montserrat) and [Inter](https://github.com/rsms/inter).
